section.title: Overview
section.para: The RTP.io module is an integrated solution for handling RTP traffic in &osips;, allowing for RTP relaying and processing inside the OpenSIPS process itself instead of requiring an external process such as RTPProxy. For some use cases this approach results in a more streamlined, efficient, and manageable system.
The module relies on the librtpproxy library to manage RTP traffic and interfaces with the existing rtpproxy module to generate commands, parse responses, and process SIP messages.

section.title: rtpproxy_args(string)
section.para: Command-line parameteres passed down to the embedded RTPProxy module upon initialization. Refer to the RTPProxy documentation for the full list.
